positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized mountain range landscape in a minimalist, geometric vector art style. The composition features layered silhouettes of peaks and deep valleys, designed for maximum contrast. Use clean, thick black lines and solid color blocks, set against a dramatic, gradient sky of deep indigo, vibrant teal, and warm burnt orange. The aesthetic should be scalable, abstract, and highly decorative, resembling Japanese woodblock prints mixed with modern graphic design. Central composition, perfect silhouette, perfect symmetry, digital artwork, high detail, designed for apparel print.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, lowres, watermark, signature, text, readable letters, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, sketch, photo, realistic, muted colors
